blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
